zh.lifeSummary: 當Parnell Warburton於1380年出生在英國英格蘭爾瓦布爾頓時，她的父親Richard Warburton14歲，母親Mrs Richard Warburton12歲。她於1395年8月10日與William Massey結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1422年之後。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Parnell Warburton于1380年出生在英国英格兰爾瓦布爾頓时，她的父亲Richard Warburton14岁，母亲Mrs Richard Warburton12岁。她于1395年8月10日与William Massey结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1422年之后。

nameMeanings.name: Warburton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a place in Greater Manchester (formerly in Cheshire) called Warburton, from the Old English female personal name Wǣrburg (composed of the elements wǣr ‘pledge’ + burh ‘fortress’) + Old English tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

variants.name: Warbritton
meanings: Probably an altered form of English   Warburton  . This form of the surname is not found in English sources.

variants.name: Warbington
meanings: English (Lancashire): perhaps a variant of   Warburton  ; otherwise a habitational name from a lost or unidentified place.

nameMeanings.name: Parnell
meanings: A female name corrupted from Petronilla.

en.lifeSummary: When Parnell Warburton was born in 1380, in Warburton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Richard Warburton, was 14 and her mother, Mrs Richard Warburton, was 12. She married William Massey on 10 August 1395. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died after 1422.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Parnell Warburton est née en 1380, à Warburton, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard Warburton, avait 14 ans et sa mère, Mrs Richard Warburton, avait 12 ans. Elle a épousé William Massey le 10 août 1395. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée après 1422.

de.lifeSummary: Als Parnell Warburton 1380 in Warburton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard Warburton 14 und ihre Mutter Mrs Richard Warburton 12. Sie hat am 10. August 1395 William Massey geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb nach 1422.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Parnell Warburton è nata il nel 1380 nel Warburton, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Richard Warburton, aveva 14 anni e sua madre, Mrs Richard Warburton, aveva 12 anni. Lei sposato William Massey il 10 agosto 1395. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì dopo il 1422.

ko.lifeSummary: Parnell Warburton(이)가 1380년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 워버턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard Warburton(은)는 14세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs Richard Warburton(은)는 12세였다. 그녀는 1395년 8월 10일 William Massey(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1422년 이후 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Parnell Warburton nasceu em 1380, em Warburton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Richard Warburton, tinha 14 anos e sua mãe, Mrs Richard Warburton, tinha 12 anos. Ela casou-se com William Massey em 10 de agosto de 1395. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu após 1422.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Parnell Warburton родилась в 1380 г. в местности варбуртон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Richard Warburton было 14 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs Richard Warburton, 12. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Massey 10 августа 1395 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла после 1422 г.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Parnell Warburton nació en 1380, en Warburton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Richard Warburton, tenía 14 años y su mamá, Mrs Richard Warburton, tenía 12 años. Se casó con William Massey el 10 de agosto de 1395. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió después de 1422.
